verses.text: Samson desires a Philistine wife; it was of the LORD. The wife. God works through his desire.
Samson desires a Philistine wife; it was of the LORD. The wife. God works through his desire.
Samson desires a Philistine wife; it was of the LORD. The wife. God works through his desire.
Samson desires a Philistine wife; it was of the LORD. The wife. God works through his desire.
He kills a lion with his bare hands. The lion. God's strength is on him.
He kills a lion with his bare hands. The lion. God's strength is on him.
He kills a lion with his bare hands. The lion. God's strength is on him.
Later he finds honey in the carcase. Honey. Sweetness from the slain.
Later he finds honey in the carcase. Honey. Sweetness from the slain.
He poses a riddle at his marriage feast. The riddle. He challenges the Philistines.
He poses a riddle at his marriage feast. The riddle. He challenges the Philistines.

He poses a riddle at his marriage feast. The riddle. He challenges the Philistines.
He poses a riddle at his marriage feast. The riddle. He challenges the Philistines.
His wife weeps it out of him and tells them. Betrayed. His secret is wormed out.
His wife weeps it out of him and tells them. Betrayed. His secret is wormed out.

His wife weeps it out of him and tells them. Betrayed. His secret is wormed out.
The Spirit comes; he slays thirty and pays the wager. Slain. His anger is roused.
